article_title: .NET 日志记录：从 Console.WriteLine 到生产级可观测性
core_theme: .NET 日志体系从基础到生产级可观测性的完整指南，覆盖 ILogger、结构化日志、Serilog/NLog/OTel 选型
reader_takeaway: 搭建可用的 .NET 日志体系：从 Console.WriteLine 过渡到结构化、可查询、带追踪的生产级日志
summary_angle: 从混乱失控的 Console.WriteLine 到结构化、可查询、可观测的生产级日志管线

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文开头——开发者从 Console.WriteLine 开始，日志混乱不可查
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：杂乱的纯文本日志流，难以辨认

information_blocks.source_anchor: ILogger + 结构化消息模板 + 日志级别分层
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心过渡：日志内容被分类标记上 Info/Warn/Error，形成结构化属性

information_blocks.source_anchor: Serilog + OpenTelemetry 统一管线，日志自动携带 TraceId
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧：结构化日志流入分析工具和追踪面板

main_metaphor: 日志从混乱文本流到结构化数据管线的转换过程
primary_subject: 一条从左到右流动的日志流，左侧杂乱无结构，经过中间分类/结构化处理后，右侧变成清晰的属性化条目并进入分析工具
subject_action: 日志条目从左向右流动，经历标记、分类和结构化转换
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: indie comic illustration, personal hand-drawn marks, muted palette, imperfect line texture, intimate editorial feeling
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；独立漫画的手工质感适合表达从混乱到秩序的手动改造过程
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 先验证从混乱文本到结构化管线的 left-to-right 叙事是否成立，三个信息块是否可辨认
revision_targets: 主体日志流不够清晰时强化对比
信息块标签太小时放大
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: .NET logging from chaotic Console.WriteLine to structured, production-grade observability pipeline. The reader should quickly feel they can build a queryable, traceable logging system.

Summary angle: From chaotic, unsearchable Console.WriteLine text streams → structured, categorized, queryable log entries flowing into analysis tools.
Narrative flow: before-after. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- Problem (left): chaotic raw text log stream, unsearchable — visible label "失控", numeric fact "Console.WriteLine"
- Mechanism (center transition): log entries being categorized, tagged with Info/Warn/Error levels, transforming into structured properties — visible label "分层", numeric fact "Info / Warn / Error"
- Takeaway (right): structured clean log entries flowing into analysis tools and trace panels — visible label "可观测", numeric fact "OTel"

Main metaphor: A log stream transforming from chaotic text into structured data pipeline.
Subject: A flowing log stream moving left to right. Left side shows messy raw text lines. Center shows categorization and structuring happening. Right shows clean structured property-chips flowing into analysis tool silhouettes., The stream transforms from left chaos to right clarity.
Composition/framing: Left-to-right horizontal progression. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: indie comic illustration, personal hand-drawn marks, muted palette, imperfect line texture, intimate editorial feeling. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: warm ochre, muted teal, soft charcoal, dusty rose.
Visible text policy: allow only 1-3 short Chinese labels or number chips, sourced from the information blocks: "失控", "分层", "可观测". No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: floating chips, meaningless code rain, neon skyscrapers, generic robot poses, cyberpunk purple-blue light pollution, dense HUD overlays, poster titles, English slogans, fake terminals.
